projects.name: Waubra
projects.note: 128x Acciona AW-1500/77 (1.5MW). Zen Energy 10yr PPA for 70% of output. Was Australias largest at 2009 commissioning.

projects.developer: Lake Bonney Wind Power Pty Ltd

projects.developer: Cullerin Range Wind Farm Pty Ltd

projects.developer: Lake Bonney Wind Power Pty Ltd

projects.name: Macarthur Wind Farm
projects.developer: Macarthur Wind Farm Pty Ltd and Meridian Wind Macarthur Pty Ltd
projects.note: Was largest wind farm in southern hemisphere at commissioning (2013). 140x Vestas V112-3.0MW. ~A$1B cost.

projects.name: Snowtown S2 Wind Farm
projects.developer: Snowtown Wind Farm Stage 2 Pty Ltd

projects.name: Musselroe Wind Farm
projects.note: 56x Vestas V90-3.0MW. Shenhua 75%, Hydro Tasmania 25%. 17.5yr Hydro Tas offtake. 5% of Tasmanias electricity.

projects.name: Gullen Range Wind Farm
projects.developer: New Gullen Range Wind Farm Pty Ltd
projects.note: 73 Goldwind turbines (56x GW100/2.5MW + 17x GW82/1.5MW). EnergyAustralia PPA. Goldwinds largest overseas project at time.

projects.name: Bald Hills Wind Farm
projects.developer: Bald Hills Wind Farm Pty Ltd

projects.name: Ararat Wind Farm
projects.note: ACT Govt 20yr PPA. Infigen developed, now Iberdrola Australia.

projects.name: White Rock Wind Farm - Stage 1
projects.developer: CECEP Wind Power Australia Pty Ltd
projects.note: 70x Goldwind GW121/2.5MW PMDD. CECEP 75%, Goldwind 25%. Goldwind EPC, Fulton Hogan BOP.

projects.name: Kiata Wind Farm
projects.developer: Kiata ProjectCo Pty Ltd atf Kiata Project Trust

projects.name: Sapphire Wind Farm
projects.developer: SWF1 Operations Holdings Pty Ltd as trustee for SWF1 Hold Trust
projects.note: 75x Vestas V117-3.6MW. ACT Govt 20yr PPA + CBA 12yr corporate PPA. Located in New England REZ.

projects.name: Silverton Wind Farm
projects.developer: PARF Company 8 Pty Ltd as trustee for the Silverton Project Trust
projects.note: 200MW, 58 x Siemens SWT-3.4-108 turbines. AGL PPA. AGL developed.

projects.name: Salt Creek Wind Farm
projects.developer: Salt Creek Wind Farm Pty Ltd

projects.name: Mount Emerald
projects.note: 53x Vestas V117-3.45MW. Ergon Energy 12.5yr PPA. Queenslands largest wind farm at commissioning. RATCH-Australia owns.

projects.name: Murra Warra Wind Farm - stage 1
projects.developer: Murra Warra Project Co Pty Ltd
projects.note: 61x Senvion 3.7MW (3XM class). Telstra PPA + ANZ/Coca-Cola Amatil/UniMelb consortium + Monash Uni. Bearing failure issues.

projects.name: Murra Warra Wind Farm - stage 2
projects.developer: Murra Warra II Project Co Pty Ltd as Trustee for the Murra Warra II Project Trust
projects.note: 38x GE Cypress 5.5-158. Telstra corporate PPA + Snowy Hydro offtake. Senvion bearing failures required staged maintenance (2024).

projects.name: Lincoln Gap Wind Farm - stage 1
projects.developer: Lincoln Gap Wind Farm Pty Ltd
projects.note: 35x Senvion 3.6M140 EBC. Snowy Hydro offtake. Owned by RATCH-Australia (acquired Dec 2022 from Nexif).

projects.name: Lincoln Gap Wind Farm - Stage 2
projects.developer: Lincoln Gap Wind Farm Pty Ltd
projects.note: 24x Vestas V136-3.45MW (3.6MW optimised). Owned by RATCH-Australia. Very high capacity factor site near Port Augusta.

projects.name: Coopers Gap Wind Farm
projects.note: Largest wind farm in Queensland. 123 turbines (91x GE 3.6MW + 32x GE 3.8MW). AGL developed, sold to Tilt 2017.

projects.name: Cattle Hill Wind Farm
projects.note: 44x Vestas V126-3.45MW. Cattle Hill Wind Farm Holdings (Goldwind subsidiary). Launched Feb 2020.

projects.name: Granville Harbour Wind Farm
projects.developer: Granville Harbour Operations Pty Ltd as trustee for Granville Harbour Operations Trust

projects.name: Dundonnell Wind Farm
projects.note: 80x Vestas V150-4.2MW. PPAs with Victorian Govt, Snowy Hydro, ALDI.

projects.name: Cherry Tree Wind Farm
projects.developer: Cherry Tree Wind Farm Pty Limited A.T.F. Cherry Tree Project Trust

projects.name: Bulgana Green Power Hub - Wind Farm
projects.note: 56 turbines. Neoen project with 15yr Victorian Govt support agreement. Nectar Farms 10yr PPA (collapsed). 20MW/34MWh BESS co-located.

projects.name: Gullen Range Wind Farm 2
projects.developer: BEIJING JINGNENG CLEAN ENERGY (AUSTRALIA) HOLDING PTY LTD

projects.name: Collector
projects.note: 40x Vestas V117-3.3MW. Origin Energy PPA. CWP Renewables developed, Squadron Energy now owns.

projects.name: Moorabool Wind Farm
projects.developer: Moorabool Wind Farm Interface Company Pty Ltd
projects.note: 107x Goldwind GW136/3.0MW across North (50) and South (57) stages. 312MW total, developed by Goldwind Australia.

projects.name: Crudine Ridge Wind Farm
projects.developer: CRWF Nominees Pty Ltd as trustee of the CRWF Trust
projects.note: 37x Goldwind GW140-3.57S. CWP Renewables/Squadron Energy. COD 2021.

projects.name: Bango 973 Wind Farm
projects.developer: BWF Nominees Pty Ltd as trustee for the BWF Trust
projects.note: 30x GE Cypress 5.3-158 turbines. Snowy Hydro 100MW offtake for combined Bango project.

projects.name: Bango 999 Wind Farm
projects.developer: BWF Nominees Pty Ltd as trustee for the BWF Trust
projects.note: First deployment of GE Cypress 5.3-158 turbines globally. 16 turbines. Woolworths PPA for ~108 NSW supermarkets.

projects.name: Berrybank Wind Farm
projects.note: Stage 1: 43x Vestas V136-4.2MW (180.6MW). Stage 2: 37x Vestas V136-4.2MW (100.5MW). Owned by GPG/Naturgy.

projects.name: Kennedy Energy Park - Phase 1 - Wind
projects.note: CF may be inflated. Hybrid facility (wind 43 MW + solar 15 MW + battery 2 MW) — OpenElectricity reports 49.5% CF for 2024 but Rystad Energy reports 42.4% AC CF. Discrepancy likely due to energy attribution between co-located DUIDs. Windlab confirms Kennedy ranked #2 in NEM behind Coonooer Bridge (~45%), inconsistent with 49.5%.

projects.name: Stockyard Hill Wind Farm
projects.note: Largest wind farm in southern hemisphere at commissioning (2021). 149 turbines, Goldwind GW140-3.57S. 4x STATCOM units + 5x harmonic filters.

projects.name: Port Augusta Renewable Energy Park - Wind
projects.note: 50x Vestas V150-4.2MW (wind) + 110MW solar. BHP Olympic Dam PPA + Woolworths PPA. Owned by Iberdrola. Elecnor EPC.

projects.name: Kaban Wind Farm
projects.note: 37x Vestas V117-4.2MW. 100MW/200MWh BESS co-located. Neoen developed. Powerlink SynCon for system strength. Far North QLD.

projects.name: Mortlake South Wind Farm
projects.developer: Mortlake South Wind Farm Pty Ltd
projects.note: ACCIONA. Nordex N149/5.X turbines. Zen Energy PPA. Fully operational July 2024.

projects.name: Dulacca Wind Farm
projects.developer: Dulacca Energy Project Co Pty Ltd
projects.note: 43x Vestas V150-4.2MW. CleanCo 126MW PPA. RES developed, Octopus acquired. Opened Oct 2023.

projects.name: Flyers Creek Wind Farm
projects.developer: Flyers Creek Wind Farm Pty Ltd
projects.note: 38x GE 3.8-137 turbines. Iberdrola Australia developed. Located near Orange, NSW.

projects.name: Goyder South Wind Farm 1A
projects.developer: Goyder Wind Farm 1A Pty Ltd as trustee for Goyder Wind Farm 1A Trust
projects.note: 38x GE Cypress 5.5-158. PPAs: ACT Govt 100MW (14yr) + Flow Power 40MW (10yr). Inaugurated 2024, Neoen sold to Brookfield.

projects.name: Hawkesdale Wind Farm
projects.developer: Hawkesdale Asset Pty Ltd as trustee for Hawkesdale Asset Trust

projects.name: Ryan Corner Wind Farm
projects.note: 52x Vestas V150-4.2MW. Snowy Hydro PPA. Owned by GPG/Naturgy. Decmil/RJE JV BOP. Opened Dec 2024.

projects.name: Rye Park Wind Farm
projects.note: Largest wind farm in NSW. 66x Vestas V162-6.0MW EnVentus — among highest capacity onshore turbines in Australia.

projects.name: Goyder South Wind Farm 1B
projects.developer: Goyder Wind Farm 1B Pty Ltd as trustee for Goyder Wind Farm 1B Trust
projects.note: 37x GE Cypress 5.5-158. PPAs: BHP 70MW baseload agreement. Part of 412MW Goyder South complex.

projects.name: Clarke Creek Wind Farm
projects.note: 100x Goldwind ~4.5MW. Squadron Energy. Stanwell 348MW 15yr PPA. SynCon installed. A$1B financing Dec 2025.

projects.name: MacIntyre Wind Farm
projects.developer: Macintyre Windfarm Pty Ltd and Arc Energy Macintyre Pty Ltd
projects.note: Largest onshore wind farm in southern hemisphere. 162x Nordex N163/5.7MW. A$1.96B. CleanCo 400MW PPA + Stanwell + Ark/Telstra.

projects.name: Golden Plains Wind Farm East
projects.developer: Golden Plains WF1 Pty Ltd as trustee for the Golden Plains WF1 Unit Trust
projects.note: Stage 1 of Australias largest wind farm. 122x Vestas V162-6.2MW. Snowy Hydro 40% + Equinix 20% PPAs. A$2B. TagEnergy/IKEA.

projects.name: Wambo Wind Farm
projects.developer: Cubico Sustainable Investments / Stanwell Corporation (50:50 JV)
projects.note: 83x Vestas V162-6.2MW (S1:42, S2:41). Cubico/Stanwell 50:50 JV. Stanwell 15yr PPA. A$650M+ finance. S1 late 2025, S2 2026.

projects.name: Golden Plains Wind Farm
projects.note: Largest wind farm in Southern Hemisphere. 215 turbines across two stages. Stage 1 first power delivered Q1 2025.

projects.name: Golden Plains Wind Farm West
projects.note: Stage 2, 93x Vestas V162-6.2MW. Brings Golden Plains total to 1,333MW. Financial close reached.

projects.name: Lotus Creek Wind Farm
projects.note: 46x Vestas V162-6.2MW. CS Energy acquired from CIP. Vestas EPC + Zenviron BOP. A$1.3B. COD Q4 2026.

projects.name: Boulder Creek Wind Farm
projects.note: 38x GE Vernova 6.0-164. Aula/CS Energy 50:50 JV. CS Energy 20yr PPA. RES construction mgmt. A$740M. COD 2027.

projects.name: Uungula Wind Farm
projects.note: 69x GE Vernova 6.0-164 (6MW). Squadron Energy. Snowy Hydro 200MW 15yr PPA. A$820M. Part of GE 1.4GW strategic alliance. Central-West Orana REZ.

projects.name: Carmodys Hill Wind Farm
projects.note: 42x GE Vernova 6.1-158. Aula Energy (Macquarie). DT Infrastructure civil. A$900M. COD 2028.
